description: Configure bcWebCam to automatically log all scanned barcode results to a text file. Open bcWebCam's Options dialog (gear icon in the bottom toolbar), navigate to the output or logging section, and enable the file output/log to file option. Set the output file path to exactly 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ScanLogs\daily_scans.txt'. Ensure you check the box to enable logging, type the full path exactly as requested, and then click OK to apply the settings.
